search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Play Guitar Like Chuck Berry Play Guitar Like Chuck Berry In this lesson, we are checking out three guitar licks in the style of the iconic blues guitar star, Chuck Berry. Berry’s style, although often simplistic, has been copied by almost every guitar player throughout the last sixty years. Chuck heavily relied on double-stops
Decision_Reason: The page content is about learning guitar in the style of Chuck Berry, not about improving sports performance or sport-related skills.
